title: eriogonum heermannii
intro: Eriogonum heermannii, also known as Heermann's buckwheat or Heermann's globemallow, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum heermannii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has also been used in salves and ointments for topical application.
